text:
CDB will persist in the reform and development,
                                                                                                                    improve the financial model, adhere to market-based operations,
                                                                                                                    combine the fund management strength of development-oriented
                                                                                                                    finance with the organizational advantage of the government,
                                                                                                                    improve development financing mechanisms, and boost the healthy
                                                                                                                    development of credit entities, investment and financing platform. In
                                                                                                                    line with the overall layout of economic and social development,
                                                                                                                    CBD will continuously give full play to the strengths and role of
                                                                                                                    medium- and long-term investment and financing, adhere to the
                                                                                                                    direction of medium- and long-term business and uphold the posi-
                                                                                                                    tion of medium- and long-term bond bank to promote the building
